title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
company: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - South Indian Bank South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the South Indian Bank South Asia Partners family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About South Indian Bank South Asia Partners:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank South Asia Partners!
